name: Best Ever Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Barbecue sauce - bottled or homemade (see recipe)
2 Strips Bacon - uncooked and cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients, except bacon, in a large ovenproof container.
2. Lay the bacon strips on top of the mixture.
3. Place the container on the smoker grid and smoke for 2 to 2-1/2 hours.
If you don't have a smoker, cook at about 350°F for 45 minutes to 1 hour until the bacon is curling.
4. Serve with garlic bread, coleslaw, potato salad, or macaroni salad.
Makes 8 to 10 servings.
Recipe from "Cook'n Cajun Water Smoker Cookbook" by Sondra Hester.
